title: Earlier Hold-Boundary And Next-Lane History Demotion Execution
objective: Hard-demote the remaining earlier 2026-05-06 Olares Dev Residency hold-boundary and next-active-lane decision/execution family so those records no longer read like live next-slice or operator guidance for the standalone repo boundary.
dependency_note: After Packet 185, the smallest remaining earlier 2026-05-06 branch is the hold-boundary to next-active-lane family: minimal MCP trio regression rerun, deferred-Operations-Visibility hold reevaluation, hold-boundary cadence landing and host portability repair, governed live-DSN proof, host-query-engine defer decision, hold-lane dormancy, and the next-active-lane selection that opens Packet 062. Those records preserve already-closed branch evidence, but their titles and top sections still read like live next-slice or operator guidance instead of historical provenance.
execution_scope: Retitle the eight targeted Olares Dev Residency handoffs as historical hold-boundary/next-lane records and add explicit current-routing blocks.
Retitle the eight targeted Olares Dev Residency packet JSON titles as historical records and add explicit historical-note and current-routing fields.
Preserve the decision, execution, validation, and observed-state evidence as provenance rather than rewriting the historical records wholesale.
forbidden_scope: broad 2026-05-06 archive rewriting beyond top-entry demotion and routing context
mutation-seam, AI-boundary, or earlier Operations Visibility family normalization in the same packet
success_criteria: Each targeted hold-boundary/next-lane handoff now leads as a historical record instead of live next-slice guidance.
Each targeted packet JSON now carries explicit historical-note and current-routing context instead of reading like a still-live decision or execution definition.
Repo-owned status routing records the family closure and returns the next lane to fresh reassessment of the remaining earlier 2026-05-06 branches.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-054-minimal-mcp-trio-regression-rerun-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-055-deferred-operations-visibility-live-data-reevaluation-and-hold-decision-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-056-operator-hold-boundary-cadence-surface-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-057-hold-boundary-cadence-surface-host-portability-repair-and-validation-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-058-governed-live-dsn-hold-proof-and-host-graceful-degrade-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-059-post-058-host-query-engine-opening-or-defer-decision-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-060-post-059-hold-lane-dormancy-and-trigger-verdict-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-061-post-060-next-active-olares-lane-selection-decision-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Historical Olares Dev Residency','^Current routing:'
next_action: Run a fresh reassessment of the remaining earlier 2026-05-06 packet-history block around 033 through 053, where mutation-seam, AI-boundary, and Operations Visibility records still appear to remain as separate unresolved branches.
